final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between a set of AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition snippets, connected by relationship lines/arrows showing how concepts relate to each other
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and relationship connectors:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable background that supports readability — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, accessible, easy-to-understand atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a clear, visually distinct direction so each concept node is easy to differentiate — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface feel — exact paper texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept names exactly as written; relationship arrows/lines between concepts must be clearly visible; layout must be infographic-style (not a plain list)
Avoid:
